evaluation.comments: Boundary review only: one admitted DeepSeek V4 Pro call was made with thinking disabled, stream=false, no tools, no model substitution, and the approved source hash. The prompt asked for line/offset locator candidates, not quote hashes. The quote hashes were computed locally where offsets were usable and are not model-generated. raw source text, provider payloads, prompt traces, model traces, and secrets are not committed. The output is proposal-only and method quality was not evaluated.
